title: National Data Management Authority (NDMA) Achieves Top 20 Placement in CyberQ Hackathon: Demonstrating Leadership in Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Government of Guyana press item reporting that the National Data Management Authority's cybersecurity team placed in the top 20 (18th) at the UAE-hosted CyberQ: Security in the Quantum Era hackathon, which explicitly involved post-quantum cryptography, QKD, and quantum-safe migration strategies. It signals nascent domestic PQC capacity/skills rather than any Guyanese policy, guidance, or standard.
